name: MiMo-V2.5-Pro
archDisplay: Sparse MoE (384 routed experts, 8/token), 70 layers (1 dense + 69 MoE), hybrid Sliding-Window+Global attention 6:1 with learnable attention-sink bias, 3x MTP modules; text-only (no native vision/audio encoders)
note: Xiaomi's flagship coding/agentic model, 1.02T total / 42B active MoE, 1M context, fully open-sourced under MIT. Optimized for very long agentic trajectories (1,000+ tool calls); unlike sibling MiMo-V2.5, it is text-only (no native image/video/audio encoders).

results.notes: SWE-bench Verified; from the embedded fbCategories chart data on Xiaomi's official MiMo-V2.5-Pro product page. Independently corroborated (same 78.9 figure) via automatio.ai.
SWE-Bench Pro; from the embedded fbCategories/benchData chart arrays (consistent value in both blocks on the page).
Terminal-Bench 2.0; from the embedded benchmark chart data.
Humanity's Last Exam, with tool use (the page also reports 34.0 'w.o. tools'); from the embedded fbCategories chart data.

verificationNotes: Params/architecture/context/license confirmed directly against the raw HuggingFace README (XiaomiMiMo/MiMo-V2.5-Pro). SWE-bench Verified score (78.9) independently cross-confirmed identical across three sources: Xiaomi's own product-page benchmark chart, a WebSearch snippet from automatio.ai, and a separate search-result summary — high confidence. IMPORTANT CAVEAT: the numeric benchmark table inside the HuggingFace README (GSM8K 99.6, GPQA-Diamond 66.7, MMLU 89.4, etc.) is explicitly labeled 'Base Model Evaluation' — i.e. it scores the pretrained MiMo-V2.5-Pro-Base checkpoint, not the released/post-trained chat model this entry represents — so those numbers were deliberately NOT used in 'results' below to avoid misrepresenting the shipped model. Instead, results are taken from the live JS-driven comparison charts embedded in Xiaomi's own MiMo-V2.5-Pro product page, fetched and parsed directly from raw HTML/JS (bypassing any summarization risk), which score the actual released model against Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, GPT-5.4, Kimi K2.6, GLM 5.1, DeepSeek V4 Pro. A third-party aggregator (automatio.ai) also lists a much wider benchmark table (GPQA 54%, MMLU 86.7%, LiveCodeBench 80.6%, and even MMMU scores despite Pro being text-only) that conflicts substantially with both the vendor's own base-model table and the vendor's chat-model chart data, and separately implies multimodality Xiaomi itself denies for this model — treated as unreliable/likely-fabricated and excluded entirely.
